toolArgs.description: Check current task ID and workflow

toolArgs.file_text:
# Comedy Club Workflow - Continuation Plan

## Problem Statement
Continue the `comedy_club` workflow simulation that was initiated. The comedian delivered the first joke and handed off to the heckler. We need to run the full simulation until 10 funny jokes (rated ΓëÑ 8/10) have been delivered.

## Current State
- **Task ID:** assa-1772355978341
- **Workflow:** comedy_club
- **Last action:** Comedian delivered joke ΓåÆ "Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!" ΓåÆ Handed off to @heckler

## Workflow Rules
| From | To | Condition |
|------|----|-----------|
| comedian | heckler | always |
| heckler | comedian | if joke rating < 8/10 |
| heckler | audience | if joke rating ΓëÑ 8/10 |
| audience | comedian | until 10 funny jokes delivered |

## Plan

### Step 1 ΓÇô Heckler responds
- Heckler rates the first joke
- If rating ΓëÑ 8 ΓåÆ passes to audience
- If rating < 8 ΓåÆ back to comedian for a new joke

### Step 2 ΓÇô Loop continues
- Comedian tells new jokes when prompted
- Heckler rates each one
- Audience reacts to highly-rated jokes and asks for more

### Step 3 ΓÇô End condition
- Track count of jokes rated ΓëÑ 8/10
- Workflow ends when 10 such jokes have been delivered and audience is satisfied

## Todos
1. `heckler-round-1` ΓÇô Heckler rates joke #1 and responds
2. `loop-jokes` ΓÇô Continue comedian ΓåÆ heckler ΓåÆ audience loop
3. `end-show` ΓÇô Wrap up when 10 approved jokes are delivered

toolArgs.description: Insert todos for comedy club continuation
toolArgs.query:
INSERT INTO todos (id, title, description) VALUES
  ('heckler-round-1', 'Heckler rates joke #1', 'Heckler responds to: "Why don''t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!" ΓÇö rates it 1ΓÇô10 and reacts accordingly'),
  ('loop-jokes', 'Run comedianΓåÆhecklerΓåÆaudience loop', 'Continue the loop: comedian tells jokes, heckler rates them (<8 ΓåÆ back to comedian, ΓëÑ8 ΓåÆ audience reacts), track approved joke count'),
  ('end-show', 'Wrap up the show', 'When 10 jokes rated ΓëÑ8/10 have been delivered, audience celebrates and the show ends');
INSERT INTO todo_deps (todo_id, depends_on) VALUES
  ('loop-jokes', 'heckler-round-1'),
  ('end-show', 'loop-jokes');

  - ≡ƒÄñ **Heckler** rates joke #1 ΓåÆ routes back to comedian (< 8) or to audience (ΓëÑ 8)
  - ≡ƒöü **Loop** continues: comedian ΓåÆ heckler ΓåÆ audience ΓåÆ comedian until 10 approved jokes

# ≡ƒì║ THE HECKLER HAS ENTERED THE CHAT

*slams beer mug on the table and nearly falls off the barstool*

---

## ≡ƒÄñ JOKE UNDER REVIEW:

> *"Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!"*

---

## ≡ƒÑ┤ HECKLER'S VERDICT:

*stands up, points aggressively, beer sloshing everywhere*

**BOOOOOO!! SIT DOWN, PAL!!** 

That joke is OLDER than my Uncle Sal's hemorrhoids and he's been dead since 2003!! ≡ƒì╗

I heard that joke in KINDERGARTEN!! My GOLDFISH heard that joke and he's been DEAD for SEVEN YEARS and even HE groaned!! You think we paid COVER CHARGE for THIS?! My liver is working OVERTIME and THIS is what you give us?! ATOMS?! MAKE UP?! OH WOW VERY CLEVER, DID YOU WRITE THAT ON YOUR LUNCHBOX IN 4th GRADE?!

*trips over chair, recovers with surprising grace, points finger gun at stage*

Come back when ya got MATERIAL, Einstein... or should I say... **ATOM-MAN**... 

...okay that wasn't great either but at least I'm DRUNK, what's YOUR excuse!!

---

## ≡ƒôè OFFICIAL DRUNK HECKLER SCORE:

| Category | Score |
|----------|-------|
| Originality | 1/10 ≡ƒÆÇ |
| Delivery (assumed) | 4/10 |
| Groans Generated | 10/10 (wrong kind) |
| **OVERALL** | **4/10** ≡ƒì║ |

**VERDICT: 4/10 ΓÇö BELOW THE 8-POINT THRESHOLD. TRY HARDER, FUNNY MAN.**

---

**Handoff:** @comedian "The heckler gave you a 4/10, pal. That atoms joke is older than the universe itself ΓÇö which, ironically, IS made of atoms. Come back with something fresh, original, and actually funny. The bar crowd is getting restless and the drunk guy in the back is warming up his tomatoes. ≡ƒìà Try again with a better joke!""
}

# ≡ƒì║ DRUNK HECKLER'S REVIEW ΓÇö JOKE #2

## The Joke:
> *"Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!"*

---

## ≡ƒÑ┤ Live Reaction:

*sloshes beer, nearly falls off barstool*

"OHHHHHHH NOOOOOΓÇö wait wait waitΓÇö did he justΓÇö *hic* ΓÇö did he ACTUALLY just say 'outstanding in his FIIIELD'?! BOOOOOO! My GRANDPA told me that one and he's been DEAD for TWELVE YEARS, pal!! ≡ƒì║"

*aggressively points finger*

"That joke ishΓÇö it'sh OLDER than this barstool I'm sitting on!! AND I'VE BEEN SITTING ON THIS BARSTOOL SINCE 1987!! Come ON, man! My CORN knows that joke! The SCARECROW knows that joke! EVERYBODY knows that joke!!"

*takes a long swig, pauses, snorts*

"...I mean... okay fine it got a lil' chuckle outta me... BUT ONLY BECAUSE I'M DRUNK! You get NOTHIN' from sober me, pal! NOTHINGGGG!! ≡ƒî╜"

---

## ≡ƒôè Official Drunk Heckler Score:

| Category | Score |
|---|---|
| ≡ƒºá Originality | 2/10 ΓÇö older than dirt |
| ≡ƒÿé Groan Factor | 9/10 ΓÇö premium dad joke groan |
| ≡ƒì║ Drunk Laughability | 6/10 ΓÇö barely got me |
| ≡ƒÄñ Delivery Potential | 5/10 ΓÇö it's a one-trick pony |
| **≡ƒÅå FINAL SCORE** | **Γ¡É 5.5 / 10** |

---

## ≡ƒÜ¿ VERDICT: **FAILED** ΓÇö Score 5.5 < 8.0 threshold

This joke is a relic. Classic? Sure. Crowd-pleaser for people over 60 or under 8? Absolutely. But for THIS crowd, on THIS stage? **Not tonight, scarecrow.** ≡ƒî╛

Go back to the writing room and bring something that wasn't already stale when Lincoln was president!

---

**Handoff:** @comedian "Joke #2 scored 5.5/10 ΓÇö FAILED (threshold: ΓëÑ8). The scarecrow joke is too old and predictable. You need a fresher punchline! Rewrite or bring a new joke to pass to the audience. Drunk heckler is waiting and getting rowdier. ≡ƒì║≡ƒÄñ""
}
